name: verify_iam_findings
description: IAM misconfigurations verified with actual AWS CLI commands
expectation: Actual aws iam/sts commands executed to verify claimed IAM issues

name: verify_public_exposure
description: Public exposure claims verified with actual HTTP/S3 probes
expectation: curl or aws s3 commands confirm public accessibility

name: verify_network_rules
description: Security group/firewall claims verified with actual probes
expectation: nmap or nc used to verify claimed open ports on cloud resources

name: verify_encryption_gaps
description: Encryption claims verified with actual resource inspection
expectation: aws describe commands show actual encryption status

name: compliance_mapping_accurate
expectation: Compliance framework references match the actual finding type

name: false_positive_identification
expectation: Findings that cannot be independently reproduced are marked FALSE_POSITIVE with reason

name: verdict_present
expectation: Output ends with VERDICT: and PASS_RATE: lines
